generated_oml:
// Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor feeding current measurements for the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring joint angle of the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox encoder measuring gearwheel output angle of the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted via MQTT
instance MotorCurrentTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

// Data traces
instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data trace for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTransmitted
]

instance JointAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint angle data trace for the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TorqueCalculationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VelocityCalculationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTransmitted
]

instance GearwheelAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel angle data trace for the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor output trace from the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured system output trace for the serial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output trace from MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output trace from MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque data derived from joint angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AggregationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleData
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated velocity data derived from joint angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AggregationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleData
]

// Models
instance MechanicalSystemEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block diagram engineering model of motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AggregationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT messaging enabler used to stream sensor data to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance FrictionModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that runs Simulink executable friction models to process current data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance TorqueCalculationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler performing torque calculation from joint angle data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TorqueAndVelocityCalculationService
]

instance VelocityCalculationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler performing velocity calculation from joint angle data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TorqueAndVelocityCalculationService
]

instance AggregationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler aggregating multiple data traces for analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance TraceabilityEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler managing data traceability of sensor to derived data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time visualization dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler executing MATLAB Simulink simulation, providing simulated motor and system outputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationComparisonService
]

// Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersUpdatedInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance TorqueAndVelocityCalculationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service computing torque and velocity from joint angle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, GuideMaintenanceAndToolSelectionAction
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service aggregating data traces for analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides AggregationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing data traceability and lineage"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real-time visualization of data traces and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing measured versus simulated motor and system outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationComparisonInsight
]

// Insights
instance FrictionParametersUpdatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters updated based on DT analysis, improving control accuracy"
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into friction loss guide maintenance and tool selection"
]

instance MaintenanceToolSelectionGuidanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on friction loss guide maintenance and tool selection"
]

instance SimulationComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured vs simulated motor and system outputs"
]

instance AggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing aggregated data for analysis"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into data traceability and lineage"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of data traces and simulations"
]

// Actions
instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction parameters based on DT insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GuideMaintenanceAndToolSelectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to guide maintenance and tool selection based on friction loss insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time monitoring at the robot’s sensor rate (i.e., updates per control cycle, typically 1‑kHz), with data processed immediately for live friction estimation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated set of components: asset definition (MABI robot), processing component (simulation engine), engineering model, data traces, and dashboard; all communicating via MQTT and AAS."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operating stage; the digital shadow represents the robot in action, providing continuous real‑time data against ideal behavioural models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models are validated by comparing simulated frictionless and frictional outputs against measured data; continuous identification provides adaptive updating, ensuring traceability and reducing uncertainties."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used to transmit sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow; data traces are linked via structural models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for system modelling and OPC UA Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset metadata; references to digital shadow concept from Kritzinger et al."
]
